notes: Initial public app metadata release.
Historical pre-policy codename; dessert codenames start with the next release.
Added current-session score history.
Added game mode and AI difficulty meta in the UI.
Added mode switching without a page reload.
Improved mobile long press for player name editing.
Added winning line animation.
Added move, win and draw sound effects.
Added mute toggle.
Persisted player names, mode, starter, mute and AI difficulty in localStorage.
Added O, X and random round starter selection.
Added round, draw, win and win-rate statistics.
Added AI difficulty descriptions.
Kept mobile new round action under the board.
Used a Material Symbols settings icon for mobile options.
Split move sounds per player and made draw sound distinct.
Refactored the app into controller, view, game, AI and service modules.
Replaced environment variable config with typed src/app.config.ts metadata.
Moved intro audio to generated Web Audio tones instead of public assets.
Added the configured app name above the start menu with player-color glow.
Removed unused marker SVG assets after switching O and X rendering to CSS.
Added game-mode-specific default player names for player and AI modes.
Renamed the full reset action to main menu for clearer intent.
Split CSS into focused style modules and expanded native CSS nesting.
Moved style sizes, timings, shadows and spacing into global CSS tokens.
Changed default marker colors to indigo and pink.
Polished color picker swatches to remove native browser borders.
Added a winner status badge with player-colored animated background.
Kept winner status layout stable while animating its background.
Adjusted winner status spacing and border radius for visual consistency.
Added a lightweight start menu bootstrap so the game runtime loads only after choosing a mode.
Split GameController, GameView, AI, audio and game engine code into dynamic production chunks.
Preserved intro audio by creating the AudioContext during the initial start click.
Moved the mobile version label into the options modal and aligned mobile action controls.
Reserved stable space for the winner status badge to avoid mobile layout shifts.
Renamed class modules to lowercase dot-separated filenames.
Replaced SettingsStorage with SettingsService naming.
Removed the AppConfigService wrapper and read typed app config directly where needed.
Made footer and menu version labels static in HTML to avoid version flash.
Added pointer-origin ripple feedback across buttons.
Added favicon and meta description for production pages.
Polished start menu title sizing and menu width.

releases.summary: Productize the game flow with versioned settings, a pre-game setup screen, match-based play, accessibility upgrades and a lightweight PWA shell.
breaking_changes: Settings storage moved to a versioned schema.
The start flow changed from direct mode buttons to a setup-first flow.
Game state boundaries changed to support match-level play.
migration_notes: settingsSchemaVersion is added when settings are saved.
Existing names, colors, mode, difficulty, starter and mute settings are preserved when possible.
Missing match settings migrate to casual match mode.
notes: Introduced versioned settings storage with migration support.
Added a pre-game setup flow for mode, AI difficulty, starter and match mode.
Added match-based gameplay with casual, best-of-5 and race-to-5 modes.
Improved board accessibility with keyboard navigation and ARIA states.
Prepared a lightweight PWA shell with manifest and app icons.
Removed the redundant app.config.ts file and kept configuration close to its usage.

releases.summary: Unify the game action menu across desktop and mobile while polishing iconography, marker color controls and static release labels.
notes: Unified settings access into a shared modal on desktop and mobile.
Moved quick actions under the board so settings and new round share the same layout across viewports.
Removed the in-game change mode action in favor of returning to the main menu.
Added Material Symbols icons for menu actions and marker-shaped icons for player color controls.
Kept static version labels in HTML aligned with the release registry.
Refined match modes, AI difficulty disabling for PvP and menu copy.

releases.summary: Move the app shell and UI layer to Web Components with per-component templates and styles.
breaking_changes: The DOM shell moved from static page markup into an app-root Web Component.
UI module boundaries changed from a single DOM view to component-scoped templates and Shadow DOM styles.
Global CSS modules were removed in favor of component-owned styles.
migration_notes: No localStorage schema changes were introduced.
Existing saved player names, colors, mode, difficulty, starter, match mode and mute settings remain compatible.
notes: Added app-root as the top-level Web Component for the game shell.
Converted the board, scoreboard, quick actions, start menu, settings modal, history panel and footer into Web Components.
Moved component markup into .component.html files and component styles into .component.css files.
Added TypeScript declarations for Vite raw HTML imports.
Fixed PWA icon paths with public install icons for browser and Apple home screen installs.
Removed obsolete global CSS modules after moving styles into components.
